string-array.name: about_changelog_v0160
string-array.item: Replace Recording List text button with icon button

string-array.name: about_changelog_v01531
string-array.item: Optimized logic for importing external audio

string-array.name: about_changelog_v0151
string-array.item: Fixed: \'Share\' and \'Default\' buttons were not working.

string-array.name: about_changelog_v0150
string-array.item: Refactored the About screen and the recording list screen

string-array.name: about_changelog_v0141
string-array.item: Fixed a bug with the custom path

string-array.name: about_changelog_v0140
string-array.item: Custom recording storage path is now available
Added a global 1Hz high-pass filter toggle in settings
Fixed a bug with the test signal

string-array.name: about_changelog_v0130
string-array.item: EQ frequency response graph now supports drag adjustment
Increased the maximum waveform height to 200dp

string-array.name: about_changelog_v0114
string-array.item: Filters are now disabled by default

string-array.name: about_changelog_v0113
string-array.item: Restored the Show/Hide reference line button
Filters and equalizer are enabled by default
Limited effective Q value in EQ Shelf mode
Fixed frame drops in some scenarios
Fixed monitor lag when importing audio
